creator: kazuok@projectkitsune.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #3)

Correct, I apologize for the ambiguity. it wasnt the r312990 commit that caused the problem specifically, merely referencing the branch I checked out and attempted to compile.

The server I am doing this on is running 11-RELEASE - it was merely a test I was doing for the hell of it and boom, noticed an issue and wanted to bug report it. 

The last commit to nvme.h is  308855 in HEAD - it has not been modified since the latest sync from HEAD.
